positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of mystical constellations overlaying a bioluminescent nocturnal forest scene. The composition should feature stylized flora (giant ferns, glowing mushrooms) integrated with astronomical elements (crescent moons, nebulas, stylized zodiac constellations). Use a monochromatic color palette with deep indigo, electric sapphire blue, emerald green, and accents of radiant gold foil texture. The style must be graphic novel meets Art Nouveau woodcut, emphasizing sharp silhouettes, clean lines, and extreme contrast. The light source should emanate softly from the flora and the starry sky, creating deep, atmospheric shadows. Central composition, perfectly balanced, ready for apparel printing. Intricate details, minimalist yet rich.
negative: blur, artifacts, grain, watermark, text, signature, out of frame, messy, bad composition, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, grayscale, photography
